name: Secure Secret Provisioning
description: Zero-knowledge secret provisioning via HPKE encryption. Registers a request_secret tool for the agent.

SPS_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the Secret Provisioning Service (for example https://sps.blindpass.dev)

BLINDPASS_AGENT_ID.description: Stable unique identity for this agent in the BlindPass system

BLINDPASS_API_KEY.description: Preferred auth for hosted/local installs: exchange the enrolled agent API key for short-lived SPS bearer tokens

OPENCLAW_AGENT_TARGETS_JSON.description: Optional mapping of agent IDs to session targets for fulfillment delivery
